data.title: Opinion: CPI report is good news for Fed rate cuts
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Florian Elpo, investment manager at Lombard Odier Bank, said that although the details of the US February CPI report looked promising, the fact is that inflation is still above target. "In terms of inflation, this report is a positive signal, consistent with our current forecast signal. In terms of growth, it may be bad news, but in terms of the Fed's rate cut, it may be good news."
Chad Flynn, managing director of Charles Schwab UK, said that although similar declines in inflation may not become a trend, today's figures are a welcome development. "New government policies involving trade barriers and immigration controls may cause inflation to rise in the short term and slow economic growth in the long term. Inflation concerns have been front and center in recent quarters, however, economic growth has become a greater concern for market observers, so when the time is right, it may be this that prompts the next interest rate adjustment." (Jinshi)

data.title: Galaxy Digital stakes 390,298 SOL, worth $50.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to SolanaFloor, Galaxy Digital has just pledged 390,298 SOLs, worth US$50.5 million.

data.title: Analyst: US stocks are unlikely to fully enter the happy mode of the Fed's interest rate cut
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Principal Asset Management analyst Sima Shah said that today's US CPI report brought some much-needed relief to the stock market, avoiding immediate concerns about stagflation and providing room for the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates. But she warned that "the stock market is unlikely to fully enter the joy mode of the Fed's interest rate cut." "It is worth remembering that this may be the calm before the storm CPI report. Not only does the Fed need to wait for clarity on tariff policy, but once tariffs are implemented, they may bring at least some price increases, and inflation may get worse over time. The Fed and the market are not clear about how this will develop." (Jinshi)

data.title: Exploring The Intersection Of AI And Crypto In Modern Technology
data.description:
According to PANews, the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) and cryptocurrency has sparked debate over the necessity and value of such a combination. Critics often question whether AI truly needs crypto, suggesting that narratives surrounding crypto are primarily driven by gambling rather than practical applications. This skepticism is rooted in the perception that many technological advancements, including DeFi, NFTs, and the Metaverse, have not achieved their anticipated impact, with speculation overshadowing actual utility.

AI represents a significant leap in internet technology, transforming user interaction from traditional keyboard input to natural language understanding and predictive needs. This evolution has expanded human productivity limits, presenting a historical opportunity across industries, including web2, web3, and traditional sectors. The question arises as to why crypto is seemingly excluded from this AI-driven momentum, despite its potential to enhance AI environments through computational power, algorithms, and data restructuring.

Currently, AI is in its innovation and exploration phase, with AI Agent applications yet to become essential in everyday life. This nascent stage makes crypto's contributions to production relationship optimization appear premature. However, in specific verticals involving privacy, AI Agent applications necessitate crypto-driven advancements.

AI Agents are viewed as a collective redemption for crypto's historical narratives. They directly target applications, akin to the potential realized during the mobile internet era following the proliferation of smartphones. The widespread adoption of AI Agents could mark a pivotal moment for crypto, enabling the realization of distributed data contribution, computational power aggregation, incentive tracing, and edge computing visions.

The decentralized, transparent, and secure consensus architecture of blockchain can only fully leverage AI Agent integration, achieving a level of interconnectivity unattainable by web2 AI innovations alone. Despite ongoing criticism of decentralized consensus, crypto's gradual influence in sectors like DeFi and RWA is evident, diminishing the need for further debate.

The diversity within the crypto world, whether driven by short-term or long-term pursuits, reflects varied aspirations. While long-term advocates may face challenges in the short term, the presence of idealists remains crucial in a market characterized by intense competition and unpredictability. Ultimately, the market requires idealists to sustain its growth and evolution.

data.title: Binance issues important security notice regarding fake SMS scam for Bahrain users
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance said that it has learned of reports that users have received fake text messages from scammers, and found that users in Bahrain are particularly vulnerable to being targeted. Binance said that it will never contact users by phone, and we do not operate any call centers. SMS is only used to send OTP codes and does not come with a call center number. The only trustworthy source is the official Binance.com website and application.

data.title: Glassnode: If ETH consolidates at the current level, $1,900 may become a support level
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Glassnode said on the X platform that ETH's cost basis distribution shows where potential short-term support levels may form. Although ETH's price briefly fell below the main accumulation area of ​​$1,880, the address at that level basically did not respond to this decline, and a new accumulation range appeared at $1,900 (600,000-700,000 ETH). This suggests that if ETH consolidates at the current level, $1,900 may become a support level. The upper $2,200 (465,000 ETH piled up) is the potential next resistance level. The supply gap between $1,900 and $2,200 is still small, which makes it reasonable for ETH prices to rise to resistance levels in the short term.

data.title: Securitize Selects RedStone as Oracle for Apollo, BlackRock, and Other On-Chain Funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Tokenization company Securitize announced that it has selected RedStone as the oracle for on-chain funds such as Apollo and BlackRock, providing price information and other data for smart contract systems that rely on off-chain information. (Theblock)

data.title: After the release of the US CPI, the probability of the Fed remaining on hold in March remains at 97%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CME's "Fed Watch": The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in March is 97.0%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 3.0%. The probability of maintaining the current interest rate unchanged by May is 60.5%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 38.4%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 1.1%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Russia’s Central Bank to Explore Experimental System to Legally Authorize Certain Investors to Trade Cryptocurrencies
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Russian Central Bank is considering establishing a new experimental system to legally authorize specific Russian investors to trade cryptocurrencies. The Russian Central Bank has announced a proposal to allow a limited range of Russian investors to buy and sell cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin. In addition, the Russian Central Bank also proposed to legalize cryptocurrency transactions. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) Price Soars Above $84K as US CPI Data Lower Than Expected
data.description:
The CPI data for February suggest that the Fed might cut interest rates throughout 2025.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/bitcoin-btc-price-soars-above-84k-as-us-cpi-data-lower-than-expected/
